allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dar/new" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1; if \($resp\) { "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; "Length: $\($resp.Content.Length\)" } else { "Failed to connect" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Web; $content = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dar/new" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($content -match 'error|Error|exception|Exception|undefined|null'\) { $matches_ = [regex]::Matches\($content, '.{50}\(error|Error|undefined\).{50}'\); $matches_ | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } } else { "No obvious errors in HTML" }; $content.Substring\(0, 500\))
